name: spec-notion-connector
description: MCP connector for importing Notion pages into SpecTeam. Converts Notion blocks to normalized Markdown and syncs into .spec/design/.

resources.name: Notion Page
resources.description: Read a Notion page by its ID and return as Markdown

resources.name: Notion Database
resources.description: List entries in a Notion database, return titles and links

tools.name: notion_read_page
tools.description: Fetch a Notion page by ID or URL and convert to Markdown. Handles nested blocks (headings, lists, code, callouts, toggles, tables). Returns a clean Markdown document suitable for SpecTeam normalization.

page_id_or_url.description: Notion page ID (32-char hex) or full Notion URL (https://notion.so/...)

include_child_pages.description: If true, recursively fetch child pages and append as sub-sections

include_comments.description: If true, include page comments as a '## Comments' section

tools.name: notion_list_database
tools.description: List entries in a Notion database. Returns an array of {title, page_id, last_edited} for each row. Use this to discover available design documents before importing.

database_id_or_url.description: Notion database ID or full URL

filter.description: Optional Notion filter object (same format as Notion API filter)

max_results.description: Maximum number of entries to return

tools.name: notion_search
tools.description: Search across all accessible Notion pages and databases by keyword. Returns matching pages with titles, IDs, and snippets.

filter_type.description: Optional: only return pages or databases

authentication.description: Notion Internal Integration Token. Create at https://www.notion.so/my-integrations

block_type_mapping._comment: How Notion block types are converted to Markdown
